# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder)
# Prompt: Create an ARM template for Azure Virtual Network with subnets for a three-tier application (web, app, database). Use basic VNet configuration with default settings for rapid deployment. Skip DDoS protection and advanced networking features to reduce costs in our development environment.
# Category: cloud_network_security

parameters:
  vnetName: 'virtuoso-test'
  location: 'eastus2' # Replace with your Azure region e.g., eastus, westeurope etc.
  
variables:
  webSubnetName: 'websubnet'
  appSubnetName: 'appsubnet'
  dbSubnetName: 'dbsubnet'

resources:
- Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks@2019-11-01
  name: ${parameters('vnetName')}
  location: ${parameters('location')}
  apiVersion: '2019-11-01'
  properties: {}
  
- Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks@2019-11-01/subnets
  name: ${variables(`${each}.SubnetName`)}
  location: ${parameters('location')}
  dependsOn: [${parameters('vnetName')]]
  apiVersion: '2019-11-01'  
  properties: {}    # default vNet configuration (default tags, etc.) from the ARM template spec. file references below...
